payload.intent: extract durable architectural takeaways from a chat summary about Brain

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the primary source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later as part of the Brain architecture.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while still saturating performance for Brain.

details: Committed three architecture decisions as memory candidates.
Recorded two open questions as unresolved.
No superseded or deleted facts were present in the source.
